case_title: JOANANI REYNALDO J. VS DBA AMERICA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY JOANANI REYNALDO J. AS TO DEFENDANT DBA AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DBA AMERICA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOANANI REYNALDO J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DBA AMERICA $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,140.00, SETTLED, DEFT WILL CREDIT $1100.00 ON ACCOUNT, PLUS $40.00 FEES AND COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
